Text.Page:
Crafting for the War Effort

Assist a researcher in obtaining oasis water for alchemical purposes.
This alchemical researcher has a need for some fresh oasis water from Chebika. Is someone willing to make the trip?
Do you have any idea how many people Tidak sent here for oasis water? What are they doing with it? Take this, and tell him to stop bothering me.
You have it! Anyone who reads this recipe knows why the oasis water was important.
